results.title: Michael Chandler maintains that Conor McGregor wants to fight him as he defends rival over UFC 329 critics
results.description: Michael Chandler has shut down claims that Conor McGregor knowingly went into his return injured. After five years of anticipation, Conor McGregor‘s return to action this past Saturday ended in disaster as he suffered a fight-ending knee injury seconds into his UFC 329 main event clash with Max Holloway.
